videoSnippet.title: Is This The Same Person? || Alireza vs Praggnanandhaa || Norway Chess 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Firouzja, Alireza (2759) - Praggnanandhaa R (2733)
Norway Chess 2026 (Chess.com) [03] 2026.05.26
D43 Queen's Gambit Declined semi-Slav

1.d4 d5 2.c4 e6 3.Nf3 Nf6 4.Nc3 c6 5.Bg5 Nbd7 6.cxd5 exd5 7.e3 h6 8.Bh4 g5 9.Bg3 Nh5 10.Bd3 Nxg3 11.hxg3 Bg7 12.Qc2 Nb6 13.O-O-O Be6 14.Kb1 Qe7 15.Rc1 O-O-O 16.Na4 Kb8 17.Nc5 Rc8 18.Qb3 Rc7 19.Rc3 Ka8 20.Rhc1 Nd7 21.Nxd7 Bxd7 22.a4 h5 23.Qc2 h4 24.gxh4 gxh4 25.Bf5 Bf6 26.Bxd7 Rxd7 27.Ne1 Qe4 28.Qxe4 dxe4 29.Rc5 h3 30.gxh3 Rxh3 31.Rf5 Rd6 32.Nc2 a6 33.Rg1 Ka7 34.Rg4 Re6 35.Nb4 Rh6 36.Na2 Rg6 37.Rxg6 fxg6 38.Rf4 c5 39.dxc5 b6 40.Nb4 bxc5 41.Nd5 Bg5 42.Rg4 Bd8 43.Nc3 g5 44.Nxe4 Re5 45.Kc2 Kb6 46.Kd3 Kc6 47.b3 Be7 48.Rg1 Rd5+ 49.Ke2 Kb6 50.Nd2 Ka5 51.Rg4 Rd8 52.Re4 Bf8 53.Kd1 Rd6 54.Kc2 Rf6 55.Nc4+ Kb4 56.f3 Rh6 57.Nd2+ Ka3 58.a5 Rh4 59.f4 c4 60.Rxc4

0:01 Hello Everyone!
00:34 STANDINGS after Round 1
01:10 Game Starts!
02:55 Completely New Game!
10:00 pAUSE THE VIDEO!
10:30 IWITP
11:40 Legends Of The Channel
